name: Speaker Source → Set Playlist Delay
description: This action sets the delay between consecutive tracks in a pipeline's playlist. This can be useful to add a pause between announcement files or between media tracks.

config_entries.label: Pipeline
config_entries.description: Which pipeline to set the delay for. One of `media` or `announcement`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The speaker source media player to control.
